en: There are five people in our family.

ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: konako si tama, tina, taka ka sawalay si taka ka ababay maelrelre nai.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: ko tamali ka mabelreng, kensase ko tamali.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: marilay ko tinali, ko tinali ka ’ising.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: lo ikai daane ko tamali wa soTaromakana makawrivariva naiya.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Rukai language with us at home.

ab: lo taisadrasadra ki kaladraidraza wa mobaliyo nai cekele.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: konako si latakali maelrelre nai mwa walra ina takolariyase.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.
I like our family very much.
